hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Needs attention' 2>/dev/null || true
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.py'; then ruff format --quiet "$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '[^ ]*\.py')" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
